name: Tuna Melt with Bacon and Swiss Cheese
recipeIngredient: 8 slices low-fat bacon, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the bread in pairs on a work surface.
2. Spread Thousand Island Dressing over all slices of bread.
3. Top each piece of bread with a slice of cheese, folding the cheese in half if necessary.
4. Place 2 slices of bacon on 4 of the bread slices and the remaining 4 slices on top of the opposite slices.
5. Spread tuna salad over the 4 servings of bacon.
6. Invert the sandwiches so that the halves with the tuna are on top.
7. Preheat a skillet over medium heat.
8. Lightly spread the Fat Free Spread over both sides of each sandwich.
9. Place the sandwiches in the preheated skillet and cook until lightly toasted on the bottom, then flip and cook for 3 more minutes or until the cheese has melted.
